title: BEM-843 null commit sha
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/codex/proofs']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 15:54 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
runner=read('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
commit_scripts=[]
for p in Path('scripts').glob('*commit*') if Path('scripts').exists() else []:
    if p.is_file(): commit_scripts.append({'path':str(p),'preview':read(p)[:1500]})
indicators={
 'runner_has_commit_changes':'Commit changes' in runner or 'git commit' in runner,
 'runner_has_result_commit':'Commit result' in runner,
 'runner_has_continue_on_error': 'continue-on-error' in runner,
 'runner_has_git_push':'git push' in runner,
 'runner_has_commit_sha_output':'commit_sha' in runner or 'GITHUB_OUTPUT' in runner,
 'runner_has_pull_rebase':'pull --rebase' in runner,
}
status='null_commit_sha_diagnosed'
next_action='patch codex-runner commit step to always write commit SHA proof file and expose result commit SHA when changed_files exist'
state={'bem':'BEM-843','status':status,'indicators':indicators,'commit_scripts':commit_scripts,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
files={
 'governance/state/bem843_diagnose_null_commit_sha_channel.json': json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep,
 'governance/reports/bem843_diagnose_null_commit_sha_channel.md': '# BEM-843 | Diagnose Null Commit SHA Channel | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep,
 'governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md': 'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep,
 'governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md': '# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-843'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep,
 'governance/codex/proofs/bem843_null_commit_sha_channel.txt': 'BEM-843 diagnosed null commit sha channel at '+created+sep
}
for path,content in files.items(): Path(path).write_text(content)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(list(files.keys())+['governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Diagnosed why Codex status reports changed_files but commit_sha null by inspecting codex-runner commit/result indicators')
"""
No issue comments.
